steps.title: Identify the Goal
steps.content: The prompt asks to emphasize a SIMILARITY between the two artworks. This means the answer must identify something both works have in common.

steps.title: Find the Shared Element
steps.content: Choice A successfully identifies that both artworks are located in public settings—matching the notes (one in a park, one on a street). Choices B, C, and D either emphasize differences rather than similarities, contain false information, or fail to establish any connection between the two works. That matches choice A — A is correct.
